title: Every 30 Seconds You Get Bigger And Smaller
description: This Data Pack Makes You Get Bigger Every 30 Seconds And After You Reach The Max Size Your Size Will Be Rest To The Size You Started As.
body:
- This Data Pack Makes You Get Bigger Every 30 Seconds And After You Reach The Max Size Your Size Will Be Rest To The Size You Started As.

**Trigger Commands:**
- /trigger bigger_every_30_seconds.show_size_change_time
- /trigger bigger_every_30_seconds.show_size
